goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'leicester' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should 'arrive by 10:00' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should be in the 'south'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from leicester and should leave on tuesday
The train should arrive by 10:00 and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the south
The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the cheap price range
Make sure you get address and postcode
